name: name-correction-at-salon-hours-applies-and-reasks
description: User at SALON_HOURS — bot just asked for opening hours. User instead says 'actually our name is Glow Pro Salon'. Bot must apply the name correction via the LLM side-channel (turnClassifier flags it as a correction; sideChannel applies it) AND continue asking for hours. Previous behavior: parseWeeklyHours bailed to DEFAULT_WEEKLY_HOURS, the correction was silently dropped, and the bot moved to durations with the old name still in place.

turns.user: actually our name is Glow Pro Salon
